heading: Distributive share of counties of receipts for schools and roads unaffected
label: 90d Distributive share of counties of receipts for schools and roads unaffected
text: The distributive shares of the respective counties of receipts from the national forests from which the national park and recreation areas are created, as paid under the provisions of , shall not be affected by the elimination of lands from such national forests by the enactment of this subchapter.section 500 of this title
